data.title: Meigui Gongyu
data.title_japanese: 玫瑰公寓
data.synopsis:
Xiaoxue, a female photographer who likes traveling, comes to a manor full of red roses for vacation and is attracted by the beautiful scenery. Later, she meets Xun, the handsome and silent owner of the manor. Xun takes good care of Xiaoxue, but he seems to be hiding some secrets.

(Source: Official Site)

titles.title: おしりたんてい コズミックフロント

data.title: Oshiri Tantei: Cosmic Front
data.title_japanese: おしりたんてい コズミックフロント
data.synopsis:
Educational collaboration specials between Oshiri Tantei and the documentary show Cosmic Front.

Mikku will help the Butt Detective solve a case, while also teaching the newest facts about dinosaur research and space rockets.

(Source: ANN)

data.title_japanese: Allegro

titles.title: Romelia Senki: Maou wo Taoshita Ato mo Jinrui Yabasou dakara Guntai Soshiki shita
Romelia Senki: Forming a Military Organization Because Humanity Still Looks Screwed After Defeating the Demon King

data.title: Romelia Senki
data.title_japanese: ロメリア戦記
title_synonyms: Romelia Senki: Maou wo Taoshita Ato mo Jinrui Yabasou dakara Guntai Soshiki shita
Romelia Senki: Forming a Military Organization Because Humanity Still Looks Screwed After Defeating the Demon King
data.synopsis:
Rising from the ashes, a fallen noblewoman stands to save humanity!

After the Demon King's defeat, Countess Romelia's world is shattered when Prince Henri, her fiancé, publicly breaks off their engagement, dismissing her as "useless" alongside his new allies: Saint Elizabeth, the sage Ekaterina, and the swordswoman Lu Hime. What they don't realize is that Romelia possesses a secret power called "Grace," which brings her extraordinary luck. Left abandoned and humiliated, Romelia refuses to give up. With her homeland still under siege by the remnants of the demon army and her people enslaved, she embarks on a desperate mission to save them.

Facing overwhelming challenges—no army, no healers, no funds, and only inexperienced recruits—Romelia uses her wit and determination to turn the odds in her favor. She seizes fortresses from local lords to build her forces, negotiates with the church for healing, secures funds from merchants, and has her soldiers gain experience through monster hunting. Against all expectations, Romelia rises from the ashes, leading her loyal followers in a daring campaign to rescue her people and prove her worth.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: フィーリングラデーション

data.title: Feeling Gradation
data.title_japanese: フィーリングラデーション
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Feeling Gradation by ReGLOSS.

data.title: Osomatsu-san Shinsaku Short Anime
data.title_japanese: おそ松さん 新作ショートアニメ
data.background: Short series to commemorate the 5th anniversary of the Osomatsu-san official fan club.

data.title: Ruri no Houseki
data.title_japanese: 瑠璃の宝石
data.synopsis:
While shopping, high school student Ruri Tanigawa is captivated by a crystal necklace. Due to its high price, she can only dream of owning one—until her mother tells her about a mountainous area where Ruri's grandfather used to discover numerous minerals. As she makes her way to the location in the hope of finding materials to make her own accessories, Ruri meets Nagi Arato, a graduate student, who gladly shows her the way.

Soon, Ruri is left smitten when they arrive at an enormous quartz formation. More motivated than ever, she convinces Nagi to teach her more about mineralogy. With each new discovery and Nagi's lessons deepening her love, Ruri learns that there is more to minerals than just their price.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Ninja Meshi no Uta
data.title_japanese: 忍者めしの唄
data.synopsis:
Once a ninja was on a mission, he would sometimes go without food or drink, so he needed emergency food called "ninja food." We are modern ninjas too, and we are always under a lot of stress. "Ninja Meshi," a modern version of ninja food, is a gummy candy with a hard texture that locks in the flavor of the ingredients. Chew it to your heart's content and satisfy your hunger!

(Source: Official site, translated)

data.title: Ice Rink
data.title_japanese: アイスリンク
data.synopsis:
Two young people are chatting away while waiting for the ice rink to open. A gentle daydream in which colorful, eccentric animals and insects fly about, endlessly overflowing with mysterious, offbeat conversation.

(Source: PIA Film Festival, translated)
data.background: Graduate Work 2024 by Wang Ziyin, Tsinghua University, School of Fine Arts.

data.title: Into a Landscape
data.title_japanese: Into a Landscape
data.synopsis:
Today, somewhere, a landscape is born on paper. Eventually, it will become immobile. But the landscape within us never ceases to flow and expand. The colors and shapes push and pull -- not even a moment of preservation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)
data.background: 1st year work 2024 by Chihiro Yamanaka, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Pia Film Festival, translated)

data.title: Aki no Kaze Fuku
data.title_japanese: 秋の風吹く
data.synopsis:
A mysterious collection of seven short stories colored by a consistent sense of helplessness.

(Source: Pia Film Festival)

data.title: Oni Chichi Harem
data.title_japanese: おにちちハーレム
data.synopsis: Disillusioned with life and lost in thought, Noboru walks through a deep forest. Suddenly a woman of indescribable beauty appears before his eyes. She was so beautiful and sexy that the stunned guy could not keep his balance and fell off the cliff. But don't worry. Coming to his senses, Noboru discovers that he has found himself in a real man's paradise. And the local inhabitants, under the leadership of Daka, have already begun to rid the guy of despondency.

titles.title: カミゴロシ〜プロローグ

data.title: Kamigoroshi: Prologue
data.title_japanese: カミゴロシ〜プロローグ
data.synopsis:
A lupine sculptor crafts a tiny figurine of a girl, imbuing her with life and memories. He places her in his elaborate miniature model of a city, but what are the intentions of this godlike wolf-man? A revolution is brewing among his playthings, while a lone boy is driven towards a different path of revenge...

(Source: Fantasia Festival)
data.background: Kamigoroshi: Prologue premiered at the 2024 Fantasia Festival in the "Anime no Bento" section.

titles.title: ねんどろいど15周年 Anniversary PV

data.title: Nendoroid 15-shuunen Anniversary PV
data.title_japanese: ねんどろいど15周年 Anniversary PV
data.synopsis:
February 2021 marks the 15th anniversary of the Nendoroid series! This video is to celebrate 15 years of Nendoroids! We hope you enjoy it!

A total of 20 characters from the "Nendoroid" series are featured in this stop motion video - showing the Nendoroids as they all come to life at night when everyone is asleep!

The film was produced by the stop-motion animation production studio Dwarf, which has produced a number of famous stop-motion works.

(Source: GOOD SMILE CHANNEL)
